description_long: This is a metallic adjustable wrench with a long, straight handle and a crescent-shaped jaw at one end. The handle is solid and tapers slightly towards the jaw, which features a visible adjustment mechanism for altering the jaw width. The surface of the wrench shows a matte, slightly rough finish with some visible discoloration and minor wear, suggesting frequent use. The jaw section includes a knurled adjustment wheel and a movable lower jaw, typical of adjustable wrenches. The overall coloration is a muted, dark metallic brown, with some lighter patches indicating areas of wear or oxidation. There are no visible brand markings or decorative elements on the handle or jaw.
description: A well-used, metallic adjustable wrench with a long handle and a crescent-shaped, adjustable jaw. The surface is matte and shows signs of wear and discoloration.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the handle and the profile of the adjustable jaw.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the jaw opening and adjustment wheel, with the handle receding into the background.
description_view_2: Opposite side view focusing on the back of the jaw and the handle's flat surface.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the handle's end and the top of the jaw, with the adjustment mechanism partially visible.
attribute_rust_or_wear_marks: Minor wear and discoloration visible on the handle and jaw, especially near the adjustment mechanism.
